coreJobStatement: Deliver structured K-12 academic instruction to enrolled students within a safe, legally compliant, and supervised facility environment
hierarchy: Process VN only (L7 → L4). No Product BOM — output is an educational outcome.

l6Systems.name: Student Enrollment & Records Management
l6Systems.jobFamily: Admit and track enrolled students against legal, funding, and safety requirements

l6Systems.name: Instructional Program Delivery
l6Systems.jobFamily: Deliver accredited curriculum to enrolled students

l6Systems.name: Student Support & Welfare Services
l6Systems.jobFamily: Sustain physical safety and wellbeing of students during the school day

l6Systems.name: Campus Safety, Security & Emergency Management
l6Systems.jobFamily: Protect occupants and property while enabling legally compliant evacuation at all times

l6Systems.name: Facilities Management & Building Operations
l6Systems.jobFamily: Maintain physical environment to code and operational readiness

l6Systems.name: IT & EdTech Infrastructure (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Provide reliable network, device, and software infrastructure for all core steps

l6Systems.name: Administrative, Finance & Regulatory Compliance (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Ensure legal, financial, and reporting compliance across all operations

vnUnits.name: Student Information System (SIS)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Central database for all student records: enrollment, demographics, attendance, grades, IEP status, custody alerts. Required for state funding reporting. Accessed by administrators, teachers, counselors.

vnUnits.name: Identity & Access Credential Management
vnUnits.functionalJob: Issues and manages staff and student credentials used for building access, IT login, library, and cashless food service. Integrates with the physical access control layer in L6d.

vnUnits.name: Learning Management System (LMS)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Hosts curriculum, assignments, assessments, and parent communication. Increasingly the instructional core post-pandemic.

vnUnits.name: Classroom AV & Display Technology
vnUnits.functionalJob: Interactive whiteboards, projectors, displays that enable multimodal instruction.

vnUnits.name: School Nutrition Management System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Manages USDA National School Lunch Program (NSLP) eligibility, meal transactions, and reimbursement claims. Cafeteria POS at every school is federal mandate.

vnUnits.name: Health & Medical Records Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Stores student health information, medication orders, immunization records, and emergency contacts. Required for HIPAA compliance in nurse operations.

vnUnits.name: Visitor Management & Building Entry Control
vnUnits.functionalJob: Manages who enters the building at the main entrance. The first physical security layer.

vnUnits.name: Emergency Exit Alarm & Monitoring Systems
vnUnits.functionalJob: **← TÜRWÄCHTER ENTRY POINT.** Guards secondary fire exits, stairwell doors, and perimeter doors against unauthorized opening during school hours while maintaining instant single-motion evacuation capability per IBC / NFPA 101. Post-Uvalde, these doors are a primary security gap in most schools — any intruder can enter through an unmonitored propped fire exit.

vnUnits.name: Video Surveillance (CCTV)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Monitors building perimeter, corridors, entry/exit points. Required by many state school safety laws post-2018.

vnUnits.name: Lockdown & Duress Alert System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Enables instant all-staff and law enforcement notification in an active threat. Fastest-growing category since 2018.

vnUnits.name: Fire Detection & Alarm System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Mandatory life-safety system. Governed by NFPA 72 (National Fire Alarm Code) and IBC Chapter 9. Activates evacuation protocols.

vnUnits.name: Emergency Communication & PA System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Provides real-time occupant notification during emergencies and daily operations.

vnUnits.name: Building Automation & HVAC Controls
vnUnits.functionalJob: Controls HVAC, lighting, and building systems. IAQ-monitoring requirements post-COVID have accelerated upgrades.

vnUnits.name: Facilities Work Order & Asset Management
vnUnits.functionalJob: Manages maintenance requests, preventive maintenance schedules, and asset lifecycle for the building portfolio.

marquardtPosition: L5 Emergency Exit Alarm & Monitoring Systems under L6d Campus Safety, Security & Emergency Management — GfS Türwächter IoT (Exit Control 179/1125) enters as the primary exit alarm guard securing secondary fire exits against unauthorized access
